response.justification: The candidate has extensive experience in software development across multiple languages and platforms, but lacks the required C++ development experience on Windows systems (primarily uses D, JavaScript, TypeScript, and Node.js). Additionally, there is no evidence of domain expertise in capital markets, fixed income, or investment banking, nor any mention of SQL Server or Oracle experience.
strengths: Strong problem-solving and software craftsmanship skills with a focus on test-driven development and CI/CD
Experience with low-latency applications and real-time systems
Fluent in English and multiple programming languages, demonstrating adaptability
concerns: No demonstrated C++ experience on Windows platforms (mandatory requirement)
Lacks domain expertise in capital markets, fixed income, or investment banking
No mention of SQL Server or Oracle experience (mandatory requirement)
